text: Maximum Name Standard Speed Common Usage Low-Speed USB USB 1.1 1.5 Mbps Keyboards, mice Full-Speed USB USB 1.1 12 Mbps Headphones, Bluetooth devices Hi-Speed USB USB 2.0 480 Mbps Webcams, card scanners, older wireless adapters, older flash-media drives SuperSpeed USB USB 3.0 5 Gbps Flash-media drives, external storage, cameras, current wireless adapters SuperSpeed USB USB 3.1 10 Gbps Flash-media drives, external storage, 10 Gbps (Now USB networking 3.2Gen1 and USB 3.2 Gen 2) SuperSpeed USB USB 3.2 2x2 20 Gbps Very high-speed external storage, 20 Gbps networking, and video
